title: Breakwave Tanker Report 6.3.2025
summary:
Main
VLCC Market Under Pressure Amid Summer Lull and Weak Demand - Despite some mid-May signs of rate stabilization that briefly lifted sentiment
Source: Breakwave Advisors

traditional summer demand lull. However, attention now turns to the recently

in July, the third consecutive monthly hike.
